question: Plan equipment purchases for a DOE grant with staggered budget releases: Year 1 (30%), Year 2 (40%), Year 3 (30%). Equipment list: Spectrometer ($150K, Year 1), Computer cluster ($100K, Year 2), Lab setup ($50K, Year 1). Create a Google Sheet named 'Equipment_Purchase_Timeline' with purchase dates, vendor quote deadlines (3 months before purchase), and approval timelines. Add all key dates to the calendar.

output_format.total_events: [Number of deadline and purchase date events]
